---
name: New Integration
about: Request or propose a new homelab service integration
labels: integration
---

## Service

Name and link to the service you'd like integrated (e.g. Overseerr, Prowlarr, Homebridge).

## What would the integration do?

Describe what data or actions Rawkoon should expose from this service.

## API / Webhook availability

Does the service have a REST API? Webhooks? Both?

## Are you willing to contribute it?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] Just requesting — happy for someone else to pick it up
